free_text: Alpha emitting reactions on 9Be, 10B and 11B induced
by protons, deuterons and alpha-particles
Silicon p-n junction semiconductor detector
The absolute differential cross sections are
accurate within 20% and the error is mainly due to
uncertainty of the target thickness.
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases
Subent 012 was split in 015,016,017.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
The accuracy of data presentation  has been revised.
ERR-T -> ERR-1.
The self-supported target of 9Be was prepared by vacuum
evaporation and was 0.19 mg/cm2 in thickness
Error from graphic bars are indicated the
relative uncertainty from  counting statistics and
background subtraction.
fig 2 from J.Phys.Soc.Jap.,19(1964)1818

The targets of 10B and 11B were made by sedimentation
of enriched fine powder on thin formvar film of about
0.05 mg/cm2 thick, and were respectively 0.20 mg/cm2
and 0.21 mg/cm2 in thickness
Error from graphic bars are indicated the
relative uncertainty from  counting statistics and
background subtraction.
